recommendations.title: The Paper Tigers
recommendations.overview: Three middle aged men polish their martial arts skills to avenge their fallen master.

recommendations.title: The King of the Kickboxers
recommendations.overview: Jake, a New York policeman  poses as an actor to expose the making of martial-arts death movies in Thailand.

recommendations.title: Game of Death
recommendations.overview: A martial arts movie star must fake his death to find the people who are trying to kill him.

recommendations.title: The Invisibles
recommendations.overview: Following a city councils decision, a women's shelter will soon be closed and social workers have only three months to accommodate the residents.

recommendations.title: Edison
recommendations.overview: In the troubled city of Edison, a young journalist, his jaded editor, and an honest investigator from the district attorney's office join forces to gather evidence against corrupt members of an elite police unit.

recommendations.title: Texas Killing Fields
recommendations.overview: In the Texas bayous, a local homicide detective teams up with a cop from New York City to investigate a series of unsolved murders.

recommendations.title: A Force of One
recommendations.overview: Karate champion Matt Logan is enlisted by the police to train officers in self-defense after narcotics agents are killed by an assailant using the martial arts.

recommendations.title: Te3n
recommendations.overview: A grandfather, police officer and a priest join hands to investigate and find a missing child.

recommendations.title: Hollywoodland
recommendations.overview: When Hollywood superstar George Reeves dies in his home, private detective Louis Simo is hired to investigate his death and gets caught in a web of lies involving a big studio executive's wife. Based on a true story.

recommendations.title: Kung Fu Jungle
recommendations.overview: A martial arts instructor working at a police academy gets imprisoned after killing a man by accident. But when a vicious killer starts targeting martial arts masters, the instructor offers to help the police in return for his freedom.
